name: learning-camp-root
description: Root package for Learning Camp LMS

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.seed: cd Backend && node seed/generateSeeds.js && node seed/seedCourse.js && node seed/seedExam.js
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green" "cd Backend && npm run start" "cd frontend && npm start"
